properties.title: Lucani
properties.description: An ancient Oscan-speaking population of south Italy.

properties.title: Apulia
properties.description: Apulia is a region of the south-eastern Italian peninsula.

properties.title: Calabria
properties.description: Ancient Calabria comprised the southern part of Apulia and the Salento peninsula.
properties.label: Paulinus of Nola

properties.title: Cales
properties.description: Cales was an ancient city of Campania of Ausonian origins. The Romans captured the town in 335 B.C. and established a colony there.
